allow:
Bash(git -C /home/bo/repos/mtgctl commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Normalize doomsday data and opponent deck naming

- Unify gameplan "doomsday" to "combo" in database and definitions
- Normalize pile types to X+Y format \(Brainstorm+LED, Jace+LED, Consider+Unearth\)
- Consolidate opponent archetypes: Energy \(Mardu/Boros\), Pox \(Loam/MonoBlack\),
  Show and Tell \(Sneak/Omni/Aluren\), Storm adds Necrodominance subtype
- Fix Midrange subtypes \(PheliaRiddler -> Phelia\), Scythecat Cub Aggro -> Aggro: Cub
- Create league 8 for match 268

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git -C /home/bo/repos/mtgctl rm --cached PLAN.md TODO.md ARCHETYPE_GUIDE.md definitions.md board_plans.txt show_available_decks.py mtgctl.db)
